title: 做了一个给 AI 智能体做实时安全拦截的开源工具，欢迎来喷
content: I developed an open‑source tool, AgentTrust, to enforce real‑time security checks between AI agents and system tools. Before any action, the tool evaluates the operation; if uncertain, it defers to the language model, which cautions the user and blocks potentially risky commands. It can detect attack chains—e.g., harmless reading of a config plus an external request combined with encoding. The library supports direct protocol integration, is easy to configure for Claude Code and Cursor, and requires Python 3.9+.

title: 一颗子弹打退人类文明十年 | 原文
content: A single inexpensive bullet on August 10, 1915, killed a 27‑year‑old British wireless operator in the trenches of Gallipoli. The incident is portrayed as a moment where human civilization’s progress was set back by a decade due to the arbitrary loss of a single life in World War I.

title: 为什么有人开始用 CE 替代 Superpowers？关键不只是流程，而是“记忆” | 原文
content: Some teams are switching from Superpowers to CE. The switch is not merely about moving workflows; it centers on “memory.” CE stores design decisions and progress in a more persistent, shared format, improving long‑term recall and collaboration. This memory focus helps avoid repeated mistakes and maintains continuity, offering an advantage over the transient, code‑centric nature of Superpowers.

title: [插件] step-search.nvim，一个更符合直觉的多关键词聚合搜索工具
content: step-search.nvim is a Neovim plugin that lets users aggregate search results from large logs or source files into a single, ordered buffer. Users can run multiple keyword searches; the plugin collects matching lines, then reorders them by their original line numbers so the output preserves chronological context. This approach solves the problem of fragmented search results that are hard to compare or merge, and it offers a lightweight alternative to Telescope or regex searches. The plugin is available on GitHub.

title: Mihomo 和 SingBox 关于 Real-IP 在代理挂掉情况下的解析问题
content: Mihomo and SingBox face DNS resolution issues when proxies fail, especially for non‑CN domains that rely on foreign DNS. In rule mode Direct still routes DNS via the configured servers; if the foreign DNS is unreachable, even direct paths fail. Local DNS usage mitigates this for geosite:gfw but leaks leaks. SingBox allows manual DNS settings, reducing the problem, while Fake‑IP simply supplies a spoofed IP, bypassing DNS entirely. Possible workarounds include sending a Fake‑IP on lookup timeout or using a fallback DNS.

title: 最后的波折：iPhone折叠屏延期
content: Apple’s planned foldable iPhone, originally slated for a Q3 release, has faced significant delays. The device’s key feature—minimal crease—was undermined when OPPO announced a similar crease‑free foldable, using comparable glass, adhesive, and hinge technology. Apple’s reliance on proprietary components from Corning and a Japanese adhesive, coupled with supply‑chain pushback, created design setbacks. As other manufacturers like vivo and Huawei move toward near‑indelible folds, Apple must revise its philosophy and possibly adopt competitors’ solutions or postpone launch until 2026.

title: 锂电池本周行业更新4-5
content: Lithium‑battery supply has tight balance, with weekly output up 556 t to 25,370 t and lithium‑carbonate inventory rising 860 t. Current stock‑to‑supply ratio of ~73 % must climb to ~14.6 t to meet projected Q4 demand, otherwise a shortfall will grow. Zimbabwe export bans have caused inventory gaps, tightening spot markets. EV sales recovered in March, signalling strong demand for power‑batteries. Storage companies face margin pressure due to long sales cycles; hedging is often lacking. Battery manufacturers maintain high plant utilization (~115–120 %). Overall, the sector may shift from balanced to constrained as demand surges.

title: 哪个财富层次的人跃迁最难？
content: The hardest transition in wealth accumulation is moving from 1 million to 10 million yuan. Data from China’s 4.94‑billion households show that 14.17% hold ≥1 million, but only 0.42% hold ≥10 million. The jump from 1 million to 10 million reduces the probability of success drastically, requiring a shift from labor income to asset‑based income and skills such as investment knowledge and entrepreneurial thinking. Once beyond this threshold, additional wealth grows more through assets and systems than personal effort.

title: 🦀 RsClaw v2026.4.5 开源了（多 Agent / A2A / ACP / 桌面版）
content: RsClaw v2026.4.5 is an open‑source multi‑agent framework written in Rust. It replaces the fragmented OpenClaw/Agent system with native support for concurrent agents, multi‑channel scheduling, and complex task decomposition. RsClaw adds A2A, enabling cross‑machine communication and distributed agent collaboration, and ACP, linking an agent’s code generation to actionable execution. A cross‑platform desktop client (macOS, Windows, Linux) removes environment setup and command‑line use, allowing non‑developers to run agents directly. Existing OpenClaw users can upgrade with `rsclaw setup`.

content: Buffett’s day shows that wealth comes from simple, disciplined habits, not flashy displays. He lives in Omaha, keeps his old house, drives a modest car, and eats the same McDonald’s breakfast every day. He spends hours reading, invests only a few times a year, and avoids lifestyle inflation. His focus is on long‑term value, not short‑term gains. The documentary highlights that success relies on steady choices, self‑control, and continuous learning, rather than sudden fortune.

title: 上万元一斤，需求暴涨！春日经济火成“顶流”
content: Spring tea sales in China surge, with premium Dongting Mountain Longjing and other varieties commanding prices above RMB10,000 per kilogram. Demand spikes pre‑Qingming, driving domestic flushes and rapid growth on e‑commerce platforms like Tmall and Taobao. Brands such as Longchi Ancient Well and Xihu Tea adapt packaging for overseas markets, achieving a 30% rise in foreign orders, especially in Southeast Asia. Young consumers and niche teas dominate online purchases, reflecting a global expansion of China’s tea industry.

title: 曹操墓前，为何全是布洛芬？
content: During the Qingming holiday, young visitors to the Cao Cao Mausoleum in Henan adorn the site with unconventional offerings—most notably packets of ibuprofen, a pain‑relief drug tied to historical accounts of his headaches. Others bring doctors’ dolls, height‑increasing pads, and personal letters, turning tomb‑visiting into a playful, personalized ritual. These creative “feeding” practices reflect a broader trend where contemporary tourists treat visiting ancient graves as experiential cultural events rather than mere memorials.

title: 书读百遍，其义自见
content:
指数基金之父约翰.伯格有个最牛的思想：“不预测市场，而是成为市场本身。”巴菲特说过：“如果要树立一座雕像，用来纪念为美国投资者做出最大贡献的人，那么毫无疑问应该选择约翰•伯格。” 大道三千，殊途同归。股权投资也是同理，不预测优秀企业，而是成为优秀企业本身。最好的决策就是不决策，最好的投资就是不操作，这道理我刚入股市就知道，但是直到现在才算是真正做到。

黑天鹅之所以是黑天鹅，是因为它的不可测，不可避免性。塔勒布只做一件事，不预测黑天鹅，但是时刻为黑天鹅准备着。管我财的下行保护，鹿鼎公的高股息打底，其实都是完全相同的思维逻辑。…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 酒金岁月

title: 以军将领承认低估真主党实力，认为伊朗政权依然稳固，以色列除了和谈还有别的路吗？它会怎么选？
content: An Israeli military leader admitted that Israel underestimated Hezbollah’s strength and that Iran’s regime remains stable, suggesting any resolution may require an agreement with Iran rather than regime change. The comment came from a confidential recording of General Rafi Milo during a tense meeting where he apologized for a friendly fire incident and noted that Hezbollah’s operational capacity, especially its rocket attacks, still poses a threat. The recording indicates Israel and the U.S. see a negotiated settlement as the likely outcome.

title: 如何应对颠覆性的人生变故
content: The article explains that change is inevitable and often causes anxiety or distress, even when it brings positive outcomes. It advocates a three‑step approach: identify what is within your control, adopt problem‑solving strategies rather than purely emotional responses, and make decisions guided by logic and personal values. By focusing on controllable aspects, taking concrete actions, and aligning choices with core beliefs, individuals can reduce emotional burden, adapt more effectively, and even grow from disruptive life events.
